title: Robust Order Level & Buyouts Aid IDEX (IEX) Despite Cost Woes

title: Here's Why Hold Strategy is Apt for ABB Stock Right Now
text: ABB is set to benefit from higher orders due to robust customer activity and accretive pricing actions. Acquisition made by the company and its measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

title: 3 Industrial Manufacturing Stocks to Overcome Demand Softness
text: Softening industrial demand weighs on the Zacks Manufacturing - General Industrial industry's near-term prospects. However, IEX, AIT and MNTX are poised for growth on easing supply chain disruptions.

title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy on Continued Rise in Factory Orders
text: Continued demand for durable goods is driving orders, which is helping stocks Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB), EnerSys (ENS), Applied Industrial Technologies, Inc. (AIT) and IDEX Corporation (IEX).

title: What Makes Idex (IEX) a Strong Momentum Stock: Buy Now?
